violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee Line cook observed without proper hair restraint.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-Freezer needs cleaned of food debris.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Pre-cooked meatballs were stored next a box of raw ground beef and under raw bacon in the walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. A wet wiping cloth was stored on the cutting boards across from the fryers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
